final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰, structured as a 文博图鉴 reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact illustration technique and rendering finish are yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout:
  顶部：中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语
  左侧：结构拆解区，中文引线标注关键部件，配局部特写
  右上：材质 / 工艺 / 质感区，展示真实纹理小样并附说明
  右中：纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意区，展示主色板、纹样样本和文化解释
  底部：穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结
Subject: must include a full-body standing figure in authentic 少数民族服饰 as the central subject (model selection — which ethnic group and which garment system — is yours; choose the most visually representative and structurally rich example); all key garment components must be labeled with 中文引线标注
Scene/backdrop: must use a 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 paper-texture background — exact tone and surface grain are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a restrained, archival, museum-display atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a historically grounded palette drawn from the chosen ethnic garment's authentic colors — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include realistic fabric texture swatches (丝、棉、麻、刺绣、蜡染、织锦等 as appropriate) with 中文说明; exact material selection matches the chosen garment system
Text (verbatim): must include all of the following text blocks in 简体中文, clearly legible, no romanization, no English, no garbled characters:
  顶部主标题（如"○○族传统服饰图鉴"）
  副标题 + 导语（民族、地域、时代背景简介）
  左侧引线标注（各关键部件名称）
  右上材质说明文字
  右中纹样寓意 + 色彩含义说明
  底部穿着顺序流程 + 核心特征总结
Constraints: must preserve 文博图鉴 visual register throughout — realistic, structural, annotated, collectible; all text must be 简体中文, clear and legible; figure or object must be rendered with accurate structural detail; layout panels must be visually separated and readable
Avoid: 海报感、影楼感、电商感、动漫感、cosplay感、乱标注、错结构、糊字、假材质、过度装饰
